instructionalDaysDescription: MySchoolDates calculated this count from the published OUSD calendar by excluding listed weekday holidays, professional development days, collaboration/work days, teacher work days, and breaks between August 9, 2027 and May 24, 2028.
seoTitle: Oakland Unified School District Calendar 2027-2028 (OUSD) | Holidays, PDF & ICS
seoDescription: View the OUSD 2027-2028 calendar verified against the official district PDF, with Aug 9 first day, May 24 last day, holidays, breaks, printable PDF and ICS download.
calendarNotes: OUSD starts the 2027-2028 school year on August 9, 2027 and ends instruction on May 24, 2028. Thanksgiving Break runs November 22-26, Winter Break runs December 20-31, and Spring Break runs April 3-7. January 3 is a professional development day before students begin the spring semester on January 4.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Oakland Unified start school in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Oakland Unified students start school on Monday, August 9, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is OUSD Spring Break in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break on the OUSD 2027-2028 calendar runs Monday, April 3 through Friday, April 7, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for OUSD in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of instruction for Oakland Unified is Wednesday, May 24, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is OUSD Winter Break in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs Monday, December 20 through Friday, December 31, 2027. January 3 is a professional development day, and students begin the spring semester on January 4.

yearNumbers.label: Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: Calculated from the official OUSD calendar after excluding listed weekday no-school days and breaks.

yearNumbers.label: Earlier Last Day
yearNumbers.detail: The 2027-2028 school year ends three calendar days earlier than the prior year.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: OUSD's 2028 Spring Break returns to an early-April week.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2026-2027 Calendar
content: The first day moves from August 10 in 2026 to August 9 in 2027.
The last day moves from May 27 in 2027 to May 24 in 2028.
Spring Break moves from March 29-April 2 in 2027 to April 3-7 in 2028.

customSections.label: OUSD Calendar Planning Numbers
customSections.content: These 2027-2028 figures add context to the Oakland Unified calendar without repeating the main date cards. They are meant for family logistics, not as a substitute for the official PDF.

groups.label: 2027-2028 planning numbers
items: 2 semester start dates: August 9, 2027 for the fall term and January 4, 2028 after Winter Break and a professional development day.
3 long recess windows: Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, and Spring Break create the largest childcare and travel planning blocks.
3 standalone no-school weekdays before Spring Break: Professional Development Day, Indigenous Peoples' Day, and Veterans Day appear outside the major break periods.

1 transportation checkpoint to confirm before school starts: the reviewed OUSD transportation source did not list a separate 2027-2028 registration deadline, so families should check the official transportation page before relying on prior-year dates.
80+ schools and programs: districtwide dates are a starting point, but school-level calendars still matter for bell schedules, orientations, athletics, and ceremonies.

events.name: Indigenous Peoples' Day
events.description: Observed in lieu of Lincoln's Birthday.
